_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

_contextSnippet: Y100 treatment induced the accumulation of p62...Unlike the autophagy inhibitor hydroxychloroquine, however, Y100 treatment does not result in accumulation of lipidated LC3B
details: Induced accumulation of autophagy marker p62 and K48/K63 polyubiquitin linked proteins, but did not result in accumulation of lipidated LC3B (LC3-II)
